unavailable_text: 2015-05-18	BODY ATTACHMENT ISSUED CIVIL WARRANT OF BODY ATTACHMENT (BENCH WARRANT) ISSUED THIS DATE FOR ALFREDO SANTOS FROM COURT HEARING OF 4/28/15 @ 9:00AM WITH $1500.00 CASH BAIL AND VOLUNTARY RETURN RESTRICTED TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING OR PRODUCTION BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. ON ANY WEEKDAY.
